base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dracula_phase_2_cookie_monster_attack — a character (final_boss) from 1986 castlevania. Dracula Phase 2 — transformed into giant cyan-blue 'Cookie Monster' demon form after Phase 1 defeat. 4-frame animation: stomp-forward / leap / descending-claw / land. Extremely tall, Simon must whip feet while dodging leap-crushes. Final boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dracula Phase 2 — transformed into giant cyan-blue 'Cookie Monster' demon form after Phase 1 defeat. 4-frame animation: stomp-forward / leap / descending-claw / land. Extremely tall, Simon must whip feet while dodging leap-crushes. Final boss
